  assert_equals: offsetLeft expected 40 but got 350

  assert_equals: offsetLeft expected 95 but got 350

  assert_equals: offsetLeft expected 95 but got 350

  assert_equals: offsetLeft expected 40 but got 350

  assert_equals: offsetLeft expected 40 but got 350
